import.title: Import from LinkedIn
import.subtitle: Bring your professional history to Sifa. Your LinkedIn ZIP is extracted in your browser and never leaves your device.

upload.heading: Upload your LinkedIn data export
upload.descriptionMiddle: and select "Download larger data archive" (the first option on that page). Upload the ZIP file you receive (batch 1 arrives in your e-mail inbox in ~10 minutes).
upload.screenshotAlt: LinkedIn's Download my data page showing the "Download larger data archive" option selected
upload.screenshotCaption: What it looks like on LinkedIn
upload.dropZone: Drag and drop your LinkedIn ZIP file here, or click to browse
upload.dropZoneLabel: Drop zone for LinkedIn ZIP file
upload.fileTypeError: Please select a ZIP file (.zip). LinkedIn exports are delivered as ZIP archives.
upload.fileSizeError: File is too large (max 500 MB). Try re-downloading your LinkedIn export.
upload.privacyNote: Your LinkedIn ZIP is extracted in your browser and never leaves your device. The structured profile data is then written directly to your Personal Data Server through our API.
upload.publicDataNotice: Everything you import will be publicly visible to anyone, including people without a Sifa account. Unlike LinkedIn (where some data is hidden from logged-out visitors), Sifa profiles are fully public. Review your data before importing.

confirm.writingRecords: Writing {count} records to your Personal Data Server...
confirm.formattingHint: LinkedIn exports strip text formatting. We did a first pass to restore paragraph breaks and bullet points, but some descriptions may still need manual cleanup. Review your profile and edit any sections that look off.

sections.verifyHintGithub: Add your Sifa profile URL in the "URL" field or under "Social accounts" in your GitHub profile settings. We'll verify the link automatically when you save.
sections.verifyHintWebsite: Add the following tag to your site's head section. We'll verify the link automatically when you save.
sections.verifyHintFediverse: Add your Sifa profile URL to one of your Fediverse profile metadata fields. We'll verify the link automatically when you save.
sections.verifyHintRss: Add a link with rel="me" pointing to your Sifa profile URL on your feed's HTML page. We'll verify the link automatically when you save.

about.title: About Sifa
about.intro: Sifa is a professional identity network built on the AT Protocol, the same open network behind Bluesky. Your career history, skills, and endorsements live in your own data server, not in ours. Switch providers, leave Sifa, or build your own client. Your data stays yours.
about.why: LinkedIn controls the professional identity of close to a billion people. If they lock your account, your career history disappears. If they change their API, every tool that depends on it breaks. Professional identity is too important to live inside one company's database.
about.how: Sifa reads and writes professional profile data to your AT Protocol Personal Data Server (PDS). We provide the interface: the import tools, the profile pages, the endorsement system. The data is always yours, stored where you choose, portable to any compatible app.
about.name: Sifa is Swahili for "praise, reputation, and qualification." It's part of Singi Labs (from msingi, "foundation"), alongside Barazo (from baraza, "community council"). The three names match what we're building: community-owned professional infrastructure, from the ground up.
about.founderBio: , a community and conversion specialist based in the Netherlands. Guido has spent two decades connecting technology and community, from the Joomla community in 2005 to the Magento ecosystem and developer relations at companies like Euroflorist and Spryker. Sifa grew out of a simple frustration: why does a platform own your professional reputation when the technology exists to own it yourself?
about.openSource: Sifa's professional profile lexicons and import tools are open source under the MIT license. The application code is source-available on GitHub. Professional identity standards should be open to everyone, even our competitors.
about.cta: If you have a Bluesky or AT Protocol account, you already have a Sifa profile waiting. Sign in, import your LinkedIn data, and own your professional identity.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introSuffix: and based in the Netherlands. We built Sifa on the AT Protocol because professional identity data shouldn't be controlled by a single platform. This policy explains what data we handle and how.
privacy.dataStorageBody: Your professional profile data is stored in your AT Protocol Personal Data Server (PDS), not on Sifa's servers. You control your data and can move it to any compatible provider at any time. Sifa reads from and writes to your PDS on your behalf. We don't maintain a separate copy.
privacy.importBody: When you import data from LinkedIn, the ZIP file is extracted entirely in your browser. It never leaves your device. The structured profile data is then written directly to your Personal Data Server through our API. We don't store, log, or inspect the contents of your LinkedIn export.
privacy.hostingBody: All Sifa infrastructure runs in the EU. Our servers are hosted by Hetzner in Germany. Your PDS may be hosted anywhere you choose. Because profile data lives in your PDS, Sifa doesn't determine where your data is stored. You do.
privacy.euCommitmentBody: When we add services like analytics or a CDN, we'll pick EU-based providers (such as Bunny.net) or self-host open source tools on our own EU infrastructure rather than route your traffic through US companies like Google or Cloudflare.
privacy.cookiesBody: Sifa uses a session cookie for authentication and a preference cookie for dark/light mode. That's the complete list. No tracking cookies, no analytics cookies, no third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.loggingBody: We log server errors and API request metadata (timestamps, response codes) for debugging. Logs don't contain profile data and are rotated automatically. We don't use any third-party analytics or tracking services.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions, reach us at privacy@sifa.id.

dataTransparency.title: Your data on the AT Protocol
dataTransparency.body: Your professional profile is stored in your Personal Data Server (PDS). This data is public and portable -- you can inspect exactly what is stored and take it to any compatible provider.

embedBuilder.pageDescription: Add a live professional profile card to any website with a single line of code.
embedBuilder.pageSubtitle: Add a live professional profile card to any website with a single line of code.
embedBuilder.themeNote: The embed automatically adjusts between light and dark mode based on the visitor's browser setting.
embedBuilder.enterHandle: Enter a handle or DID to see a preview

notFound.easterEggMessage: You found the secret! Sifa means "praise" in Swahili. Consider yourself praised for your curiosity.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introSuffix: and based in the Netherlands. By using Sifa, you agree to the following terms.
terms.serviceBody: Sifa provides a web interface for managing professional profiles on the AT Protocol. Your profile data is stored in your Personal Data Server (PDS), not on Sifa's servers. We provide the tools to create, edit, and display that data. We don't control it.
terms.accountsBody: You sign in with your existing AT Protocol account. Sifa doesn't create or manage accounts. Your identity is managed by your PDS provider (such as Bluesky). If you delete your AT Protocol account, your Sifa profile goes with it.
terms.dataBody: All professional profile data you create through Sifa is written to your PDS. You can export, move, or delete it at any time through your PDS provider. If Sifa shuts down, your data stays in your PDS, accessible through any compatible client.
terms.contentBody: You're responsible for the accuracy and legality of the profile information you publish. Sifa may remove content from its interface that violates applicable law or community guidelines. Removal from Sifa doesn't delete data from your PDS.
terms.disclaimerBody: Sifa is provided as-is during the pre-alpha period. We don't guarantee uptime or feature stability. Your data in your PDS stays under your control regardless of Sifa's availability. If something breaks, your professional identity doesn't break with it.

endorsement.endorsementContext: How do you know this person's expertise?
endorsement.endorseComment: Share context about this person's expertise (optional)
endorsement.endorseAttribution: Your endorsement will be attributed to your profile

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.resetDescription: Deletes all Sifa profile data (positions, education, skills, and all other sections) from Sifa and your Personal Data Server, then takes you to the import page to start over. Your Sifa settings, AT Protocol account, Bluesky profile, posts, follows, and data from other apps are not affected.
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Removes the same Sifa profile data as Reset Profile, plus your Sifa settings (notifications, content filters, and similar preferences), then signs you out. Your AT Protocol account, Bluesky profile, posts, follows, and data from other apps are not affected. To delete your AT Protocol account entirely, visit your PDS provider's settings.
dangerZone.deleteModalTitle: Your Sifa account has been deleted.
dangerZone.deleteModalBody: Your AT Protocol account and Personal Data Server still exist. Sifa only removed its own data. If you want to delete your AT Protocol account entirely, visit your PDS provider's settings.
dangerZone.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
